blue_oceans.notes: 2.69M community across WeAreTheMusicMakers, beatmakers, edmproduction subs. All apps are DAWs or social music platforms. No app gamifies the daily beat-making habit (one new drum pattern, one melodic loop, one sample integration logged daily) with streak XP, producer technique badges, and beatmaker level progression.

2.66M community. Yousician/Simply Piano teach instrument skills. No app is a Duolingo equivalent for pure music theory — daily streak covering intervals, modes, chord progressions, rhythm reading, and ear training with XP, theory-level badges, and musician tier gates.

2.30M community. All apps are tools, not habit trainers. No app gamifies the daily mixing/mastering practice habit (one EQ decision justified, one compression ratio applied and documented, one reference track A/B comparison logged) with streak XP, engineer rank badges, and mix engineer level gates.

2.67M community. Apps are tools (chord finders, AI generators). No app gamifies the daily songwriting craft habit (one hook written, one verse completed to a chord progression, one song structure mapped) with streak XP, songwriter level gates, and craft technique badges.

2.12M community. STEEZY is a class platform (paid subscription). No app is a free daily hip-hop dance streak with XP for daily drills — one isolation exercise, one combo practice, one freestyle session — with technique level gates and dancer rank badges.
104K community — smaller than typical P0 threshold. Apps are minimal quality. A daily salsa streak could capture the niche but community is limited. Mark SOFT_COMP pending community verification.

343K community. STEEZY has classes but no streak system. No app gamifies the daily contemporary dance habit (one isolation drill, one floorwork combo, one improvisation phrase) with streak XP, movement quality badges, and dancer level gates.
91K community — niche but dedicated. No dedicated streak app for breaking. Mark SOFT_COMP — Olympic-level attention since Paris 2024 could mean growing community worth targeting.

5.44M community. Apps are editing tools and camera apps. No app gamifies the daily photography practice habit (one composition rule applied, one lighting study completed, one editing technique practiced) with streak XP, photographer level gates, and technique mastery badges. 365-photo-challenge apps exist as basic galleries, not gamified skill progressions.

1.40M community. Apps are retouching tools, not skill trainers. No app gamifies the daily portrait photography habit (one lighting setup studied, one posing direction practiced, one retouching technique applied) with streak XP, portrait skill badges, and photographer level progression.

1.87M community. VSCO has editing and social but no gamified daily street photography streak. No app gamifies the daily street photography habit (one decisive moment captured, one compositional rule applied deliberately, one image edited with a signature style) with streak XP, Magnum-level badges, and street photographer tier gates.

3.88M community. Procreate is a general illustration tool. No app gamifies the daily fashion sketching habit (one croquis figure completed, one garment draped on figure, one fabric rendering technique practiced) with streak XP, design school milestone badges, and fashion designer level gates.

5.00M community. Apps are wardrobe organizers and recommendation engines. No app gamifies the daily outfit design habit (one outfit built around a style constraint, one color theory principle applied, one styling challenge completed) with streak XP, style level progression, and fashion icon tier gates.

1.05M community. Apps are pattern organizers and pattern shops. No app gamifies the daily sewing habit (one seam type practiced, one fitting adjustment made, one technique tutorial completed and logged) with streak XP, sewing level gates, and couture skill badges.
